questions.question: Statement: Only students who submit assignments on time may sit the exam. Conclusion I: Ravi did not sit the exam → Ravi did not submit on time. Conclusion II: Ravi submitted on time → Ravi sat the exam. Which follows?
questions.solution: Step 1: 'Only P → Q' means Q requires P. Step 2: Contrapositive and direct valid → Both I and II. Answer: Both I and II.
